name: @alexandrebrillant2/llm-client
description: LM-client is a lightweight library that provides a unified REST API interface for interacting with various language models (Ollama, ChatGPT, Mistral, etc.). It abstracts provider-specific details into modular plugins, offering a simple and consistent way to integrate multiple LLM services into your applications.
author: Alexandre Brillant

scripts.build: cp src/*.mjs dist && cp -r src/providers dist
scripts.test: npm run test:ollama && npm run test:ollama-cloud && npm run test:chatgpt
